seoTitle: Export Data From HubSpot: Full Extraction Guide
metaDescription: Export your HubSpot CRM data as CSV or Excel files, choosing objects, properties, and file formats through the Export Center dashboard.
intro: Whether you need a backup or want to move data elsewhere, HubSpot's Export Center lets you pull entire objects like Contacts, Companies, or Deals into a downloadable file. This guide covers navigating to the export tools, choosing your file format, and selecting which property columns to include. It ends with tracking the download queue and handling the file securely once it's ready.

steps.heading: Open your account settings
steps.body: Click the gear icon in HubSpot's top navigation to access account configurations.

steps.heading: Go to Import & Export
steps.body: Navigate to the Import & Export section in the left sidebar to access data utilities.

steps.heading: Start an export
steps.body: Click Go to Export Center and select your target CRM database objects.

steps.heading: Choose your file format
steps.body: Pick between Excel spreadsheets or raw CSV files, and select which property columns to include.

steps.heading: Confirm security settings
steps.body: Toggle any encryption options and confirm admin authorization if prompted.

steps.heading: Download the file
steps.body: Wait for the processing queue to complete, then click the download link to open your finished export.

faq.question: What file formats can I export HubSpot data in?
faq.answer: You can typically choose between Excel spreadsheets and raw CSV files.

faq.question: Can I export just specific properties instead of everything?
faq.answer: Yes, you can select which property columns to include before generating the export file.

faq.question: How long does an export take to process?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on the size of the dataset, and you'll get a notification with a download link once it's ready.

faq.question: Is exported data encrypted?
faq.answer: HubSpot offers security options like encryption toggles and admin authorization to help protect sensitive exports.
